title: Lue Elizondo on Detecting UFOs & Using INFRARED
summary: A brief discussion between Jesse Michels and Lue Elizondo about how UFOs might be detected, touching on human perception as an interface and the potential usefulness of infrared technology for spotting UAPs.

key_claims.claim: Humans generally see between 400 and 700 nanometers in the electromagnetic wave spectrum
Infrared, specifically a particular band of it, is interesting for detecting UFOs
